steps.title: Identify the given equation
steps.content: The given equation is $m = 6(n + p)$. The question asks which choice expresses $m$ in terms of $n$ and $p$ — meaning which choice is the literal restatement (or an equivalent form) of the given equation.

steps.title: Match the equation to a choice
steps.content: Choice B states $m = 6(n + p)$, which is identical to the given equation. The other choices add extra terms or factors that change the value. That matches choice B — B is correct.
